name: Nicole Lockett
description: Nicole Lockett is an immigration attorney at Watson Immigration Law, focused on employment-based immigration for companies and individuals.
credentials: H-1B, L-1, and O-1 visa expertise
bio: Nicole Lockett is an immigration attorney at Watson Immigration Law, where she advises both companies and individual clients on employment-based immigration matters.
Nicole focuses on nonimmigrant work visas including H-1B, L-1, and O-1 categories, helping employers navigate the increasingly complex landscape of U.S. immigration compliance.
